title: Hunter Shively
compiled_truth: Hunter Shively is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-07-19), Hunter Shively sent 591 and received 591 emails, totalling 1182 interactions. Top correspondents: [Airam Arteaga](people/airam-arteaga) (131), [Chris Gaskill](people/chris-gaskill) (34), [Richard Tomaski](people/richard-tomaski) (21), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (17), [Geoff Storey](people/geoff-storey) (16). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, deleted_items, inbox, old_messages, sent, sent_items.
